france.heroSubtitle: France leave the World Cup after a 2–0 defeat by Spain.

brazil.selectorLine: Eliminated · Neymar scored in his last World Cup
brazil.heroSubtitle: Neymar scored one last time, but the Seleção leave the stage.

norway.statusLabel: Qualified for the quarter-finals · next challenge: England
norway.heroSubtitle: Norway knocked out Brazil and now meets England in Miami.

spain.tagline: La Roja chase a second star
spain.heroSubtitle: Spain face Argentina in a final between a legend and a new world.

egypt.selectorLine: Eliminated in the Round of 16 · huge regrets

belgium.statusLabel: Qualified for the Round of 16 · next: United States

england.heroSubtitle: England’s World Cup journey ends one match short of the final.

argentina.tagline: Messi and the Albiceleste chase a fourth star
argentina.heroSubtitle: Argentina beat England 2–1 and face Spain in the final.

switzerland.statusLabel: Qualified for the quarter-finals · next challenge: Argentina
